title: PPG recognized on Newsweek's America's Greatest Workplaces for Women 2023 list
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE PPG) today announced that it has been recognized by Newsweek magazine in its 2023 list of America's Greatest Workplaces for Women. The list ranks the top 600 U.S. companies with at least 1,000 employees. The results are based on a survey of more than 37,000 women on topics including compensation and benefits, work-life balance and proactive management of a diverse workforce.

title: Why You Should Add PPG Industries (PPG) to Your Portfolio
text: PPG Industries (PPG) will benefit from the cost savings from restructuring activities and pricing actions to counter inflation.

title: PPG recognized as an ‘Exceptional Workplace' for employee engagement by Gallup
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG has been recognized as an ‘Exceptional Workplace' for employee engagement by Gallup.

title: PPG's U.S. woodcare brands announce Chestnut Brown as 2023 Stain Color of the Year
text: PITTSBURGH--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG (NYSE: PPG) today announced that its OLYMPIC® Stains by PPG and PITTSBURGH PAINTS & STAINS® brands have selected Chestnut Brown as their 2023 Stain Color of the Year. Balancing between retro and elegant, this rich color complements trends of warm minimalism and earthy hues and can be used to help homeowners create an aesthetic that is on-trend with popular design styles.

title: Why You Should Retain PPG Industries (PPG) in Your Portfolio
text: PPG Industries (PPG) gains from cost-saving actions, acquisitions and pricing initiatives amid headwinds from weaker demand in Europe and China, elevated input costs and softness in housing.

title: PPG Industries (PPG) Launches Envirocron Primeron Primer Series
text: PPG Industries (PPG) presents PPG Envirocron primeron powder primer series that protects metal substrates against corrosion.

title: PPG Industries: Getting Closer To A Reasonable Valuation
text: PPG Industries has an outstanding dividend record, having paid and grown its dividend for 50 years. The market was too subdued in January and February in the face of many uncertainties.

title: PPG and Tasca Racing announce sponsorship for 2023 hot rod season
text: STRONGSVILLE, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG has extended its sponsorship of the Tasca Racing team for the 2023 NATIONAL HOT ROD ASSOCIATION® season.

title: PPG Industries' (PPG) Marine Coating Saves Power, Cuts Emissions
text: PPG Industries (PPG) offers a new marine coating PPG Sigmaglide that results in lower power consumption and reduces greenhouse gas emissions.

title: PPG SIGMAGLIDE 2390 marine coating delivers dramatic power savings and emissions reductions
text: AMSTERDAM--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PPG has launched PPG SIGMAGLIDE® 2390 marine coating, a breakthrough approach to help shipowners lower power consumption and carbon emissions.
